mapper.select:
SELECT id, order_export_task_no, tenant_id, operator_id, client_id, order_status, order_start_time, order_end_time, export_format, total_count, status, file_url, fail_reason, start_time_actual, finish_time, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM oms_order_export_task
AND order_export_task_no LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.orderExportTaskNo}, '%')
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND operator_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.operatorId}, '%')
AND client_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.clientId}, '%')
AND order_status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.orderStatus}, '%')
AND order_start_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.orderStartTime}, '%')
AND order_end_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.orderEndTime}, '%')
AND export_format LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.exportFormat}, '%')
AND total_count LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.totalCount}, '%')
AND status LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.status}, '%')
AND start_time_actual LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.startTimeActual}, '%')
AND finish_time LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.finishTime}, '%')
